# Generated by Orchestre

> **This is a curated example, not the output of a real `/orchestre-go` run.**
> It demonstrates Orchestre's **multi-stack capability** — same invoicing SaaS,
> different stack: **SvelteKit + Drizzle + Stripe**. Patterns and file structure
> are illustrative; the cost/duration/score numbers are representative estimates,
> not measured values.

---

## Original Prompt

```
/orchestre-go "Build an invoicing SaaS where freelancers can create, send, and track invoices. Stripe for payments."
```

## The 5 Questions + Answers

| # | Question | Answer |
|---|----------|--------|
| 1 | **Who is the primary user?** | Freelancers and independent contractors who need to invoice clients |
| 2 | **What is the ONE core feature?** | Creating and sending professional invoices with line items |
| 3 | **Do you need payments?** | Yes — Stripe for invoice payments via payment links |
| 4 | **Any existing code?** | No — greenfield project |
| 5 | **Design preferences?** | Clean, minimal dashboard. Light/dark mode. Professional feel. |

## Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Framework | SvelteKit 2 (Svelte 5 runes) |
| Database | PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM |
| Auth | Lucia Auth v3 |
| Payments | Stripe (Checkout + Webhooks) |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS (semantic tokens) |
| Validation | Zod |
| Deployment | Vercel / Node adapter |

## Pipeline Summary

```
Wave 0 — Brief Validation
  ✅ PROJECT.md linted (0 errors)
  ✅ No secrets detected
  ✅ Stack: SvelteKit + Drizzle + Stripe

Wave 1 — Feature Decomposition
  ✅ 5 user-facing features identified
  ✅ No generic CRUD — real user flows

Wave 2 — Atomic Planning
  ✅ 14 tasks planned (all ≤3h)
  ✅ DAG built — 3 parallel tracks
  ✅ Critical path: auth → invoices → payments

Wave 3 — Code Generation
  ✅ 3 worktrees executed in parallel
  ✅ 14/14 tasks completed
  ✅ 0 hook violations

Wave 4 — Post-Generation Audit
  ✅ Score: 85/100
  ✅ 0 critical issues
  ✅ 2 recommendations (design polish, email templates)
```

## Final Audit Score: 85/100

| Category | Score | Notes |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Architecture | 92/100 | Clean separation, Result pattern, Drizzle singleton |
| Security | 83/100 | Webhook sig verified, auth middleware, missing rate limiting |
| Design | 78/100 | Semantic tokens used, needs more polish on mobile |
| Code Quality | 87/100 | Zod everywhere, no `any`, explicit types |
